title: Fix package imports not found after parameters applied

features.name: package wildcard import in package scope
features.description: Code should include wildcard package imports (import pkg_name::*) in a package scope before class definitions

features.name: virtual class with type parameter
features.description: Code should include a virtual class declaration with a type parameter defaulting to int

features.name: class extending parameterized virtual class
features.description: Code should include a class that extends a parameterized virtual class with a concrete type argument

features.name: randomize with constraint referencing imported enum
features.description: Code should include a randomize() with constraint that references an enum value imported from a package
features.snippet:
if (!req.randomize() with { req.p_type == MEM_REQ; }) begin
end
